message.content:
{
  "page_type": "parameter_table",
  "summary": "This page from a manual for a screw-type air source heat pump (YEAS series) details parameter settings and control logic for the compressor and fans. It includes two parameter setting interfaces (界面-7 and 界面-8) with tables of setpoints and ranges, along with explanatory text on control conditions for oil heating, pressure, temperature, and current.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "table", "label": "参数设置界面-7"},
    {"type": "table", "label": "参数设置界面-8"},
    {"type": "table", "label": "排气压力与风机启停逻辑表"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "参数设置的范围 (界面-7)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "参数说明 (界面-7)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "参数设置的范围 (界面-8)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "参数说明 (界面-8)"},
    {"type": "header", "label": "控制中心"},
    {"type": "header", "label": "螺杆式空气源热泵YEAS系列"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "排气压力", "relation": "triggers action on", "to": "1# 风机"},
    {"from": "排气压力", "relation": "triggers action on", "to": "2# 风机"},
    {"from": "压缩机电流", "relation": "triggers action on", "to": "压缩机卸载"},
    {"from": "吸气压力", "relation": "triggers action on", "to": "压缩机卸载"},
    {"from": "吸气压力", "relation": "triggers action on", "to": "压缩机关机"},
    {"from": "排气压力", "relation": "triggers action on", "to": "压缩机关机"},
    {"from": "回油温度", "relation": "triggers action on", "to": "压缩机关机"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["parameter_setting", "control_logic", "safety_protection", "operational_ranges"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "参数设置界面-7\n1# 风机启动压力设定 1350Kpa\n2# 风机启动压力设定 1650Kpa\n排气压力过高卸载 2500Kpa\n排气压力过高保护 2700Kpa\n油冷开启回油温度 75.0 ℃\n油冷关闭回油温度 95.0 ℃\n回油过高报警温度 110.0 ℃\n\n参数设置界面-8\n压缩机卸载电流比 95%\n制冷低压卸载保护 350Kpa\n制冷低压过低保护 250Kpa\n制热低压卸载保护 150Kpa\n制热低压过低保护 100Kpa\n制冷出水温度过低 2.0 ℃\n制热出水温度过高 55.0 ℃",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The exact model or full system context is not visible. Some relationships are inferred from control logic descriptions (e.g., '当排气压力≥...设定值时，压缩机关机') but the visual evidence is the text stating the condition, not a direct diagrammatic link.",
  "confidence": 0.9
}

parsed.summary: This page from a manual for a screw-type air source heat pump (YEAS series) details parameter settings and control logic for the compressor and fans. It includes two parameter setting interfaces (界面-7 and 界面-8) with tables of setpoints and ranges, along with explanatory text on control conditions for oil heating, pressure, temperature, and current.

visual_entities.label: 排气压力与风机启停逻辑表
螺杆式空气源热泵YEAS系列

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
参数设置界面-7
1# 风机启动压力设定 1350Kpa
2# 风机启动压力设定 1650Kpa
排气压力过高卸载 2500Kpa
排气压力过高保护 2700Kpa
油冷开启回油温度 75.0 ℃
油冷关闭回油温度 95.0 ℃
回油过高报警温度 110.0 ℃

参数设置界面-8
压缩机卸载电流比 95%
制冷低压卸载保护 350Kpa
制冷低压过低保护 250Kpa
制热低压卸载保护 150Kpa
制热低压过低保护 100Kpa
制冷出水温度过低 2.0 ℃
制热出水温度过高 55.0 ℃
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The exact model or full system context is not visible. Some relationships are inferred from control logic descriptions (e.g., '当排气压力≥...设定值时，压缩机关机') but the visual evidence is the text stating the condition, not a direct diagrammatic link.
